/usr/bin/c++   -I/usr/lib/llvm-17/include -std=c++17   -fno-exceptions -funwind-tables -D_GNU_SOURCE -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -I/usr/lib/llvm-17/include  -Wall -Wextra  -L/usr/lib/llvm-17/lib  CMakeFiles/Inv.dir/main.cpp.o  -o Inv  /usr/lib/llvm-17/lib/libLLVMCore.a
